About Me

📍 Teresa, Rizal  |  University of Rizal System

I am Dan Rudolf M. Pantaleon, a proud resident of Teresa, Rizal, where the quiet streets fuel my imagination and give me the peace I need to grind through late-night gaming sessions and school projects alike.

I currently study at the University of Rizal System, pursuing my academic goals while keeping my eyes fixed on a future in the game development industry.

Gaming has been more than just a hobby for me — it is the lens through which I understand storytelling, design, and the kind of immersive experiences I aspire to one day build myself.

Whether I am strategizing in ranked matches, theorycrafting new builds, or binge-watching developer diaries, every moment I spend with games is a lesson in the craft I am determined to master.
